pi_items.metadata_value: Open-source Integrated Clinical Environment for medical device interoperability
pi_items.verified_value: OpenICE is an open-source medical device integration platform from the MD PnP (Medical Device Plug-and-Play) Interoperability Program, establishing a foundation for medical device interoperability and clinical applications
pi_items.source: env.json description; https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp (confirmed active, v2.0 released May 31, 2024); MD PnP official documentation at mdpnp.org and mdpnp.mgh.harvard.edu
setup_openice.sh line 66 clones from this URL; GitHub repository confirmed to exist and be active with v2.0 latest release

pi_items.metadata_value: 3-step Functional Verification Protocol (FVP) with SpO2 threshold transitions: 80% (nominal), 100% (interlock trigger), 80% (recovery)
pi_items.verified_value: Task requires 3 steps: Step 1 nominal (80% threshold, verify pump infusing), Step 2 interlock test (100% threshold to force safety violation, pump should stop), Step 3 recovery (back to 80%, pump resumes)
pi_items.source: task.json description lines 6-13 and CSV expectations

pi_items.metadata_value: Scoring: Artifacts (25pts), CSV Logic (25pts), Log Verification (20pts), VLM Verification of Interlock Screenshot (30pts); Pass threshold: 70 points
pi_items.verified_value: verifier.py implements: Artifacts found (6.25pts each, max 25), CSV protocol steps (8+9+8=25pts), Log checks (5pts each x4, max 20pts), VLM screenshot analysis (30pts or 15pts partial); Pass: score >= 70 AND interlock verified

privileged_info_summary: The task validates an infusion pump safety interlock system using OpenICE, an open-source medical device integration platform from the MD PnP program (https://github.com/mdpnp/mdpnp, v2.0). The task expects 3 screenshots and 1 CSV file with specific artifact paths and CSV content: rows with step numbers 1/2/3, thresholds 80%/100%/80%, pump states Infusing/Stopped/Infusing, and PASS status. The protocol tests nominal operation (80% SpO2 threshold with active pump), safety interlock trigger (100% threshold forcing pump stop), and recovery (return to 80% with pump resuming). Verification includes artifact existence checks, CSV content validation (checking for specific step/threshold/state combinations), system log inspection, and VLM-based screenshot analysis of the critical interlock state. All data is synthetic (simulation-based) with no real medical device data involved.
